message:
feat(shell): add JSON message types with TERM and window size

Add structured message types for vsock shell protocol:
- OpenMessage: user, term type (e.g. xterm-256color), cols, rows
- ResizeMessage: cols, rows for terminal resize
- ExitMessage: exit code when shell exits
- ErrorMessage: error string for failures

Each type has Marshal/Unmarshal methods for JSON serialization.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
